displayCourseCodes: STMATH 498/499 are variable-credit courses (1-5 credits). Up to 5 credits combined of STMATH 498/499 can count towards mathematics electives. The credits may be graded (4.0-scale) or ungraded (CR/NC; Credit / No-Credit). For information on registering for STMATH 498/499, contact your academic adviser .
